coachAM: Your "lock in young with a clear" aspiration is collapsing under the weight of unmanaged digital inputs, specifically Instagram and "loop scrolling," directly sabotaging your Sleep Protocol and Training, which are both at 43%. This isn't about time management; it's about a fundamental lack of self-governance against the very distractions you recognize as "laziness," preventing the deep restorative rest and physical output essential for elite performance and sustained spiritual fortitude. The root cause is a porous boundary between your declared intentions and your actual execution, eroding the integrity of your word to yourself and God, which will inevitably manifest as an inability to "close University Social Project" or be "the best seller" if you can't even close the door on late-night scrolling. Today, before 9 PM, delete Instagram from your phone and move all other social media apps to an obscure folder on your last screen.
